series_metadata.series_description: This form, INV0102, is used by Ohio Investigative Unit personnel to request that a citation case be referred to the Citation Review Board before being forwarded to the Attorney General's Office.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Attach to the case in OASIS and retain permanently. ; Paper: Scan into the Ohio Agent Secure Information System (OASIS) and attach to case. The paper copy can be destroyed upon successful completion of the scanned record into OASIS., Electronic: Permanent ; Paper: Shred
